## Description

<!-- Briefly describe the resource(s) you are adding and why they belong here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Resource is related to AI SE Agent evaluation
- [ ] Added to the correct `data/*.json` file (not directly to README or docs)
- [ ] All required fields are filled: `id`, `name`, `stage`, `subcategory`, `what`, `type`, `tags`
- [ ] `what` is ≤80 characters and written in English
- [ ] `subcategory` is from the valid list in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `python scripts/process/validate.py` passes with no errors
- [ ] `python scripts/generate/generate_readme.py` has been run and generated files are committed
